calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Continued To Jan-06-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Dignity Health?S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue To Shasta County Superior Court; And For Payment By Plaintiff?S Counsel Of Defendant?S Expenses And Attorney?S Fees Incurred In Making This Motion, In The Amount Of $3,500; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH's Motion To Transfer Venue To Shasta County Superior Court; And For Payment By Plaintiff's Counsel Of Defendant's Expenses And Attorney's Fees Incurred In Making This Motion, In The Amount Of $3,500.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted pursuant to stipulation. The court will execute the parties' proposed stipulation.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
